emails.subject: RE: Weekly Report
emails.body: RE: Weekly Report What were the terms of the sale (spot) to Empire? Thanks To: Mahan, Mariella; Curran, Greg; Y'Barbo, Paul; Jaramillo, Javier; Lopez-Silva, Lynnette; Wong, Jay; Torres, Tony; Ortiz, Mauricio

emails.subject: RE: Weekly Report
emails.body: Empire Gas terms are MB 11 (end of the month average) ($0.05/gallon margin) import tax ($4/barrel) odorant ($0.0005/ gallon). Invoices are due net 30 days. Saludos To: Mahan, Mariella; Curran, Greg; Y'Barbo, Paul; Jaramillo, Javier; Lopez-Silva, Lynnette; Wong, Jay; Torres, Tony; Ortiz, Mauricio
